2026-04-03.patch_summary: This patch splits the main initialization logic in io_buffer_register_request() into a helper function called io_kernel_buffer_init(). This is done to prepare for supporting kernel-populated buffers in fuse io-uring, which will reuse this logic. The new function takes several parameters and initializes an io_mapped_ubuf structure, while the original function now calls this helper and handles some additional tasks. The patch also includes changes to error handling and data structures.
